description.value: Aura strong (no school); CL 17th; Weight 5 lbs. Price varies by specific type: Lesser extend metamagic rod 3,000 gp Extend metamagic rod 11,000 gp Greater extend metamagic rod 24,500 gp DESCRIPTION The wielder can cast up to three spells per day that are extended as though using the Extend Spell feat. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Rod, Extend Spell Cost varies by specific type: Lesser extend metamagic rod 1,500 gp Extend metamagic rod 5,500 gp Greater extend metamagic rod 12,250 gp
